source.scope: Official-source-backed Mauritius annual individual income tax and Fair Share Contribution for income years 2025-26 through 2027-28.

MU.notes: Annual chargeable-income bands plus the 15% Fair Share Contribution on caller-confirmed leviable income above MUR 12 million when the statutory threshold income exceeds MUR 12 million.

register.coverageSummary: Annual individual income tax and Fair Share Contribution on caller-confirmed chargeable, threshold and leviable income.
